description: An academic math paper with LaTeX math, theorem/proof environments, numbered equations, and references
visual_assertions: The paper title should be centered at the top in a larger sans-serif font
Author names and affiliation should be centered below the title in smaller text
The Abstract paragraph should be indented on both sides
Display math equations should be centered on their own lines with equation numbers right-aligned
Inline math expressions should appear within the flow of prose text
The Theorem 3.1 block should have a blue left border and light gray background
The Proof section should end with the QED square (□) right-aligned
References should be in smaller font with hanging indent formatting
Section headings (1. Introduction, 2. Preliminaries, etc.) should be in sans-serif
